comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Test Coverage**: The `--skip-description` flag logic and conditional Claude availability check are not tested. Add test cases to verify: (1) flag is properly threaded to SubmitState, (2) Claude check is skipped when flag is True.

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Already covered: test_pr_submit_skip_description_skips_claude_check (tests/commands/pr/test_submit.py:45) verifies both that --skip-description threads to SubmitState and that require_claude_available is skipped when True.

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-23 06:26 PST_

comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Test Coverage**: Early return paths for `skip_description=True` in extract_diff (line 495), fetch_plan_context (line 534), generate_description (line 553), and finalize_pr (line 668) are not tested. Erk requires comprehensive test coverage for all code paths.

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Already covered: All 4 pipeline steps have test_skip_description_returns_state_unchanged tests — test_extract_diff.py:94, test_fetch_plan_context.py:59, test_generate_description.py:59, test_finalize_pr.py:480.

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-23 06:26 PST_
